summary: Tested Letter Pad 3-feature batch: Templates Library (8 templates), Drafts CRUD, WhatsApp Share. All 23 backend tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified with Playwright.

issues: Minor HTML hydration warning: button inside button element (cosmetic only, does not affect functionality)

seed_data_creation: Created test drafts during testing (auto-cleaned by test fixtures)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Letter Pad features fully working: Templates (8 pre-seeded), Drafts CRUD with title preservation, WhatsApp share via 360Messenger. WhatsApp API key is configured in this installation - real messages will be sent.

test_classes: TestTemplatesLibrary (10 tests) - list templates, get each of 8 templates by ID, 404 for invalid
TestDraftsCRUD (7 tests) - create, list sorted, update with title preservation, delete, 404 cases
TestWhatsAppShare (3 tests) - empty body 400, missing phone 400, valid request response shape
TestPDFDocxGeneration (2 tests) - PDF and DOCX generation with size > 5KB
TestLetterPadSettings (1 test) - settings endpoint returns all expected fields

template_apply: Template applied - body has 344 chars - PASS
Subject populated: 'Request for Account Statement' - PASS
Toast 'Template apply ho gaya' shown - PASS
drafts_crud: Toast 'Draft save ho gaya' shown - PASS
new_button: New button cleared body field - PASS
whatsapp_buttons_disabled: WhatsApp Phone button disabled when body empty - PASS
WhatsApp Group button disabled when body empty - PASS
whatsapp_phone_dialog: WhatsApp Phone button enabled when body has content - PASS

templates_library.details: 8 pre-seeded templates: Bank Statement, Supplier Reminder, Agent Dispute, Govt Inquiry, Truck Owner Notice, Paddy Quality, NOC Request, GST Compliance. Each has id, name, category, icon, preview (list) and full body/subject/to_address/references (detail).

drafts_crud.details: Create draft with auto-UUID, list sorted by updated_at desc, update preserves title when not in payload (regression test passed), delete with 404 for invalid ID.

whatsapp_share.details: Empty body returns 400 'Letter body khaali hai', missing phone returns 400 'Phone number daalein'. Valid request generates PDF, uploads to tmpfiles.org, sends via 360Messenger. API key is configured in this installation.

pdf_docx_generation.details: PDF and DOCX endpoints return correct Content-Type and size > 5KB.
